title: Section 1
content: (1) This Act may be called the National Jute Board Act, 2008. (2) It extends to the whole of India. (3) It shall come into force on such date1 as the Central Government may, by notification in the Official Gazette, appoint.
footnote: 1. 1st April 2010, vide notification F. No. 3/6/2007-Jute, 30th March, 2010, see Gazette of India, Extraordinary, Part I, sec. 2
